name: ParallaxBackground
summary: Full-bleed background layer that drifts on scroll for a depth effect; place it inside a `ParallaxScroll` as the backmost layer, and honor reduced-motion (the effect auto-disables) — experimental decorative widget.

bestPractices: Parallax layers honor `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`: the scroll-driven displacement collapses to zero, so layers track the page 1:1 (no relative movement) for motion-sensitive users. The media still renders; only the parallax effect is removed.
